revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Expand German]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->
#redirect[[en:Template:Expand German]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page--> [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Expand German]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page--> [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]]

revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove [[en:...]] and [[sn:...]] interwiki links
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_German here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_German for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Expand language
|langcode=de
|section={{{section|}}}
|otherarticle={{{1|}}} <!--keep this as it is -->
|date={{{date|}}}
|fa={{{fa|}}}
|topic={{#switch: {{{topic}}}
 | bio = Biography
 | cult | culture = Culture
 | geo = Geography
 | gov = Government and politics
 | hist = History
 | mil = Military
 | sci | tech | scitech = Science and technology
 | sport = Sports
 | struct = Building and structure
 | transp = Transport
 |
}}
|nodoc={{{nodoc|}}}
|set={{{1|}}}
|no interwiki={{{no interwiki|}}}
}}
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_German for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Expand language
|langcode=de
|section={{{section|}}}
|otherarticle={{{1|}}} 
|date={{{date|}}}
|fa={{{fa|}}}
|topic={{#switch: {{{topic}}}
 | bio = Biography
 | cult | culture = Culture
 | geo = Geography
 | gov = Government and politics
 | hist = History
 | mil = Military
 | sci | tech | scitech = Science and technology
 | sport = Sports
 | struct = Building and structure
 | transp = Transport
 |
}}
|nodoc={{{nodoc|}}}
|set={{{1|}}}
|no interwiki={{{no interwiki|}}}
}}
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
